{{- $menuID := .menuID }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- with index site.Menus $menuID }}
{{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }} {{- define "_partials/inline/menu/walk.html" }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- range .menuEntries }} {{- partial "navigation/menu-button.html" (dict "page" $page "entry" .) }} {{- with .Children }}
    {{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }} {{- end }} {{- end }}
